title: poa ragonesei
intro: Poa ragonesei, also known as Ragonese's meadow-grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its aerial parts which contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, and have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Poa ragonesei include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and prevent infections. The herbal preparations of Poa ragonesei include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by infusing the aerial parts in hot water, and can be used to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions.
